ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage of the competitor */,
  "brand_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the competitor brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the competitor was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the competitor's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candy_bars" (
  "candy_bar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candy bar */,
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competitor that produces the candy bar */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candy bar */,
  "chocolate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar contains chocolate */,
  "fruity" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar has a fruity flavor */,
  "caramel" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar contains caramel */,
  "peanut_almond" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar has peanut or almond flavors */,
  "nougat" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar contains nougat */,
  "crisped_rice_wafer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar contains crisped rice wafer */,
  "hard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar is hard */,
  "bar" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar is a bar form */,
  "pluribus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar has pluralities */,
  "sugar_percent" REAL /* Percentage of sugar content in the candy bar */,
  "price_percent" REAL /* Price percentage of the candy bar */,
  "win_percent" REAL /* Win percentage of the candy bar in the market */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the candy bar was launched */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Caloric content of the candy bar */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging for the candy bar */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar is vegan-friendly */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar is gluten-free */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candy_bar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candy_bars_competitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("competitor_id") REFERENCES competitors ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ingredient */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candy_bar_ingredients" (
  "candy_bar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candy bar */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candy_bar_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for market data entry */,
  "candy_bar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candy bar */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the market data */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year for the market data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the market data */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Sales volume of the candy bar */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the candy bar */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion during the sales period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_candy_bar_id FOREIGN KEY ("candy_bar_id") REFERENCES candy_bars ("candy_bar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for consumer preference */,
  "candy_bar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candy bar */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the consumer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the consumer */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candy bar is a favorite of the consumer */,
  "purchase_frequency" INTEGER /* How often the consumer purchases the candy bar */,
  "review" TEXT /* Consumer's written review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_preferences_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_preferences_candy_bar_id FOREIGN KEY ("candy_bar_id") REFERENCES candy_bars ("candy_bar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the consumer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the consumer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the consumer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the consumer */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the consumer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)
